name: Companion's Counsel
title: Mika: Companion's Counsel
in_play_description: When your Mika, who has this card equipped, is on the field, triggering Soulwind will cause the next Normal Attack by that character this turn to deal Physical DMG +2 DMG.

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Mika to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

skills.desc:
Combat Action: When your active character is Mika, equip this card.
After Mika equips this card, immediately use Starfrost Swirl once.
When your Mika, who has this card equipped, is on the field, triggering Soulwind will cause the next Normal Attack by that character this turn to deal Physical DMG +2 DMG.
(You must have Mika in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
